# Find All Approximate Occurrences of a Collection of Patterns in a String

I'll solve this Rosalind problem using Assembly language. This problem asks us to find all approximate occurrences of multiple patterns in a string with a given maximum Hamming distance.

## Problem Understanding

Given:
- A string Text
- A collection of patterns
- A maximum Hamming distance (d)

We need to find all positions where each pattern occurs approximately (with at most d mismatches) in the text.

## Assembly Solution

```assembly
.section .data
    # Input strings and parameters
    text:       .ascii "
